PROOF OF SERVICE FOR MOTION TO COMPEL (TRANSACTION ID # 200005940) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEXIBLE FUNDING LTD. LIABILITY CO.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FLEXIBLE FUNDING LTD. LIABILITY CO.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE); FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE (SET ONE); FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE); AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED IN FULL. VERIFIED, RESPONSES TO THE INTERROGATORIES, AMENDED RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THE DOCUMENT PRODUCTION SHALL BE SERVED WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,062.50 ARE DUE AGAINST DEFENDANT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

Motion To Compel Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Catherine S. Robertson, esq. (408-918-2835) of Pahl & McCay for Plaintiff via Court Call.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FLEXIBLE FUNDING LTD. LIABILITY CO.'s Motion To Compel Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Compel Responses to Special Interrogatories (Set One); Form Interrogatories, Set One (Set One); Further Responses to Request For Production of Documents (Set One); and Requests for Admissions be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED in full. Verified, responses to the interrogatories, amended responses to the Requests For Production of Documents and the document production shall be served within two weeks of service of this order. The Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanction in the amount of $3,062.50 are due against defendant in favor of plaintiff.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
